source_old_req: The Task thread implementation Task.impl_1 shall execute periodically with a period of 100 ms and a priority of 100, under the ARINC653 Periodic dispatch protocol. The thread's computation execution time shall be within the range of 0 ms to 3 ms. Environmental assumptions shall hold that all data or events received by the Task thread when it is scheduled are valid inputs. The thread's behavior shall guarantee that its computation results depend only on the current inputs and its internal computation results, and that any state updates do not violate the data type constraints of its ports. The Task thread shall invoke the subprogram Hello_Spg_1 through the call interface P_Spg.
natural_requirement: The Task component shall execute according to the scheduling and timing constraints defined for Task.impl_1. The implementation shall use the Periodic dispatch protocol, execute with a period of 100 ms, complete compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms, and run at priority 100.

requirement_items.text: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall run at priority 100.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Priority as 100.

requirement_items.text: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall execute using the Periodic dispatch protocol.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Periodic.

requirement_items.text: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall execute with a period of 100 ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Period as 100 ms.

requirement_items.text: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_time as 0 ms .. 3 ms.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Priority as 100. The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Dispatch_Protocol as Periodic. The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Period as 100 ms. The Task.impl_1 implementation shall assign Compute_Execution_time as 0 ms .. 3 ms.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Task.impl_1 implementation shall run at priority 100. The Task.impl_1 implementation shall execute using the Periodic dispatch protocol. The Task.impl_1 implementation shall execute with a period of 100 ms. The Task.impl_1 implementation shall complete its compute execution within 0 ms .. 3 ms.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
